query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_tokens` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `token` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `description` text, `isActive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `expiresAt` timestamp, `lastUsedAt` timestamp, CONSTRAINT `api_tokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `api_tokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`));
